contamination_firewall.rule: This branch is self-contained. It does NOT import, reference, or inherit SPARTA_BRAIN weekly relative-strength rotation, FRC, BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES, the DR/K gate framework, Strategy-Lab promotion, or any other cross-project mechanic/universe/gate vocabulary. Its lifecycle, gates, and terminology are its own.

deliverable_chain: Step 02 -- methodology plan (objective, target, allowed/forbidden features, data requirements, discovery/OOS constraints, validation gates, exact Step 03 requirements).
Step 03 -- DATA/FEATURE/TARGET AUDIT (audit-only; no model/cluster/signal/backtest/returns/fetch beyond what the audit requires; grounded in committed Step 02).
Later steps -- separately authorized; not pre-approved here.
objective_one_line: Define the scope of a research project to PREDICT, at decision time, whether the near-future environment of each of four futures markets (ES, GC, CL, 6E) is a 'bad regime' (to be precisely defined in Step 02) -- a supervised classification/forecasting problem, NOT a trading system.
rationale_for_universe: Four liquid, structurally-distinct futures markets across asset classes (equity / metal / energy / FX) so that 'bad regime' prediction can be studied both per-market and cross-market without single-asset idiosyncrasy dominating. Universe is FIXED for this branch.

temporal_scope.oos_holdout: 2025 (strictly sealed; untouched until a separate pre-registered evaluation gate)

what_this_is: A multi-market, decision-time predictive-classification study: given only information available at time t, estimate the probability/label that market m enters a 'bad regime' over a forward horizon H. The deliverable is predictive understanding + honestly-measured classification quality -- never orders, signals, or P&L.
what_this_is_NOT: NOT a trading strategy, signal generator, or execution system.
NOT a returns/PnL/Sharpe study -- evaluation is classification quality only (e.g., AUC/precision/recall/calibration), computed in later authorized steps.
NOT a claim of tradeability, OOS confirmation, live readiness, or profitability at any stage of this branch.
